description: Don't allow the monsoon to dictate your fashion sense! Wear these stylish wedge-heeled sandals from catwalk to bare the elements and look fabulous. This pair goes with denims, skirts and even leggings. Upper Wide strap to hold the forefoot with cutouts, stitch detailing and riveting Upper riveted to the outsole for durability Padded heel patch for comfort Outsole TPR outsole with wedged heel and textured patterning on the outsole for grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
